evidence: "I love old murder mysteries and I liked these!"
"Good space movie with very good actors."
"A lawyer and his wife solve the murders."
"Interesting story, great scenery, and good actors."
"This is a very old movie but the film was perfect."
"If you like old vintage ‘scary’ movies then this collection is right for you."
"For a 1941 movie it was a great, clear film and good sound."
"I love William Powell and all the Thin Man movies!"

additional_patterns.name: nostalgia_preference
evidence: "Loved Charlie Chan movies as a child and now as an adult!"
"I love old films so it was a very good one!!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for vintage films, particularly murder mysteries and space movies, often appreciating their quality and nostalgic value. They enjoy simple narratives with a slower pace and have a fondness for specific actors and directors, indicating a medium level of brand loyalty.
